original_datasets.name: Dataset
original_datasets.notes: Analysis scripts expect the file at /app/data/Dataset.csv during execution. Variable names inferred from the provided R Markdown scripts.

tasks.task_instruction: Conduct the analysis without restrictions. Reproduce partial correlations controlling for age, then perform PCA-based sensitivity and a partial correlation network with Bonferroni correction.

analysis_path.path_description: Compute partial correlations between MiniK_Total and DSM5_Total, and HKSS_Total and DSM5_Total controlling for Age; compute PCA of MiniK_Total and HKSS_Total and correlate with DSM5_Total controlling for Age; compute a partial correlation network including life history and psychopathology variables with Bonferroni threshold.
preprocessing_steps: Residualize MiniK_Total, HKSS_Total, and DSM5_Total on Age to compute partial correlations.
Compute first principal component of MiniK_Total and HKSS_Total; correlate component with DSM5_Total controlling for Age.
Compute partial correlation network among specified variables; apply Bonferroni correction (0.05/55) for significance display.

key_choices.main_predictor_measure: MiniK_Total and HKSS_Total as measures of life history strategy.
control_variables: Additional variables in network sensitivity: Bio_Sib, Half_Sib, Step_Sib, Stepparent, SH_Total, Attach_Total, Aggresion_Total
key_choices.missing_data_rule: Listwise deletion within each analysis step.
key_choices.data_processing: Residualization for partial correlations; PCA on MiniK_Total and HKSS_Total; z-scoring within partial correlation network routine.
key_choices.model_choice: Partial correlations via residualization; PCA for composite measure; precision-matrix-based partial correlation network.
key_choices.inference_rule: Two-sided p-values for correlations; Bonferroni correction alpha = 0.05/55 for network edges.

outcome.name: DSM5_Total
outcome.definition: DSM-5 Self-Rated Level 1 Cross-Cutting Symptom Measure-Adult total score.

main_predictor.name: MiniK_Total and HKSS_Total
main_predictor.definition: Mini-K and HKSS measures of life history strategy.

analysis_code.notes: Python translation of the R Markdown Task1 analysis. Expects /app/data/Dataset.csv. Writes JSON results to /app/data/Multi100-CCBE4-Task1_results.json.

tasks.notes_for_agent: Follow this planned path. Do not change the focal claim, dataset, or analysis goal.

tasks.task_instruction: Report Mini-K measure instead of HKSS for life history strategy; test partial correlation of MiniK_Total with DSM5_Total controlling for Age.

analysis_path.path_description: Compute partial correlation between MiniK_Total and DSM5_Total controlling for Age.
preprocessing_steps: Residualize MiniK_Total and DSM5_Total on Age.

key_choices.missing_data_rule: Listwise deletion within the variables used.

outcome.name: DSM5_Total
outcome.definition: DSM-5 Self-Rated Level 1 Cross-Cutting Symptom Measure-Adult total score.

main_predictor.name: MiniK_Total
main_predictor.definition: Mini-K measure of life history strategy.

analysis_code.notes: Python translation of the R Markdown Task2 analysis. Expects /app/data/Dataset.csv. Writes JSON results to /app/data/Multi100-CCBE4-Task2_results.json.

tasks.notes_for_agent: Use the Mini-K predictor as instructed. Do not switch to HKSS or add different models.

files.data/Multi100-CCBE4-Task1__py.py: Python script translating Task1 RMarkdown: computes age-controlled partial correlations (MiniK/HKSS with DSM5), PCA-based sensitivity, and a partial correlation network with Bonferroni correction. Reads /app/data/Dataset.csv and writes results JSON.
files.data/Multi100-CCBE4-Task2__py.py: Python script translating Task2 RMarkdown: computes age-controlled partial correlation between MiniK_Total and DSM5_Total. Reads /app/data/Dataset.csv and writes results JSON.

codebase.notes: Original R Markdown files are present but execution is set to the Python translations to comply with the execution policy. Ensure Dataset.csv is mounted at /app/data.

analysis.instructions: Execute Task1 and Task2 using the original Dataset.csv. Use the provided Python scripts to compute partial correlations and sensitivity analyses, and produce structured JSON outputs for results.
not_allowed_actions: replace the planned path with a different analysis path

debugging_rule.repair_scope: fix dependency, file path, or output extraction issues only; do not redesign the analysis.

analysis.comparison_metrics: Partial correlation coefficients (r), p-values, and N for: MiniK_Total vs DSM5_Total (Age-controlled), HKSS_Total vs DSM5_Total (Age-controlled; Task1 only), MiniK_Total vs HKSS_Total (Age-controlled; Task1 only), PCA component vs DSM5_Total (Age-controlled; Task1). Bonferroni-significant edges in the partial correlation network (Task1).
